To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a Lua script
that can handle basic Git operations such as initializing a repository and      
adding files. Below is the implementation of minigit:                           

minigit.lua                                                                     

                                                                                
#!/usr/bin/env lua                                                              
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
local function usage()                                                          
                                                                                
    print("Usage: minigit <command> [args]")                                    
                                                                                
    os.exit(1)                                                                  
                                                                                
end                                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
local function init_repo(path)                                                  
                                                                                
    path = path or "."                                                          
                                                                                
    local git_dir = path .. "/.git"                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if not (io.open(git_dir, "r") == nil) then                                  
                                                                                
        print("Repository already initialized.")                                
                                                                                
        os.exit(0)                                                              
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    io.popen("mkdir -p " .. git_dir)                                            
                                                                                
    io.popen("touch " .. git_dir .. "/HEAD")                                    
                                                                                
    io.popen("echo 'ref: refs/heads/master' > " .. git_dir .. "/HEAD")          
                                                                                
    io.popen("mkdir -p " .. git_dir .. "/objects/info")                         
                                                                                
    io.popen("mkdir -p " .. git_dir .. "/refs/heads")                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    print("Initialized empty Git repository in " .. path .. "/.git/")           
                                                                                
end                                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
local function add_file(file)                                                   
                                                                                
    local git_dir = ".git"                                                      
                                                                                
    local objects_dir = git_dir .. "/objects"                                   
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if not (io.open(git_dir, "r") == nil) then                                  
                                                                                
        print("fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories):  
.git")                                                                          
                                                                                
        os.exit(1)                                                              
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    local object_type = "blob"                                                  
                                                                                
    local content = io.popen('cat ' .. file):read("*a")                         
                                                                                
    local hash = io.popen('echo -n "' .. content .. '" |                        
sha1sum'):read("*a"):sub(1, 40)                                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if not (io.open(objects_dir .. "/" .. hash, "r") == nil) then               
                                                                                
        print("Already added.")                                                 
                                                                                
        os.exit(0)                                                              
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    io.popen('echo -n "' .. content .. '" > ' .. objects_dir .. "/" .. hash)    
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    local index_file = git_dir .. "/index"                                      
                                                                                
    if not (io.open(index_file, "r") == nil) then                               
                                                                                
        print("fatal: unable to create file .git/index: File exists")           
                                                                                
        os.exit(1)                                                              
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    io.popen('echo -n "' .. object_type .. ' ' .. hash .. '\t' .. file .. '" > '
.. index_file)                                                                  
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    print("Added file to the staging area.")                                    
                                                                                
end                                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
local function main()                                                           
                                                                                
    if #arg < 1 then                                                            
                                                                                
        usage()                                                                 
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    local command = arg[1]                                                      
                                                                                
    local args = table.pack(table.unpack(arg, 2))                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if command == "init" then                                                   
                                                                                
        init_repo(args[1])                                                      
                                                                                
    elseif command == "add" then                                                
                                                                                
        add_file(args[1])                                                       
                                                                                
    else                                                                        
                                                                                
        print("Unknown command: " .. command)                                   
                                                                                
        usage()                                                                 
                                                                                
    end                                                                         
                                                                                
end                                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
main()

 • Add a file to the staging area:
